title: Smucker (SJM) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates

title: J.M. Smucker stock jumps toward 6-year high after profit and sales beat expectations and outlook raised
text: Shares of J.M. Smucker Co. SJM, +1.11% jumped 3.7% toward a six-year high in premarket trading Monday, after the consumer and pet foods company, which brands including Folgers, Jif and Milk-Bone, reported fiscal second-quarter profit and sales that beat expectations and raised its full-year outlook, as a 17 percentage point in price realization helped offset a 6-point decline in volume and mix.
